docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $106.29 FILED BY SIMONS DEPARTMENT STORE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES NOEMY AKA MORALES NOEMI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES NOEMY AKA MORALES NOEMI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMONS DEPARTMENT STORE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES NOEMY AKA MORALES NOEMI $106.29 PRINCIPAL, $29.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $135.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES NOEMY AKA MORALES NOEMI HEARING SET FOR AUG-10-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-09-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES NOEMY AKA MORALES NOEMI
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-10-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM AUG-10-1992 TO AUG-24-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES NOEMY AKA MORALES NOEMI
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-24-1992, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES NOEMY AKA MORALES NOEMI
